name: xiaohongshu-cli
description: Xiaohongshu (小红书) in your terminal — search notes, read posts, interact, and publish via reverse-engineered API.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Authenticate via browser cookies or QR code

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read a post from the last listing

commands.name: like
commands.description: Like a post from the last listing

use_cases: Search and summarize Xiaohongshu discussions on a topic
Monitor trending content and hot categories
Extract post data for content analysis
